ITIM - E31 Instruction Tightly Integrated Memory

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x1800000
Size:
0x2000
Source:
scpu.rdl

Description

8 KiB of instruction cache memory backed on-demand scratch pad memory. Allocates automatically on first write in this region. Deallocated by writing 0 to itim_dealloc.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
